title: NO SPOILERS Q gets lanced by IMDB
display_title: NO SPOILERS Q gets lanced by IMDB
wikitext:
[]: [NO SPOILERS] Q gets lanced by IMDB             Quote Post by Guy Nacks » Fri Dec 28, 2012 1:09 am http://www.imdb.com/title/tt0860907/ Say what you will about the usefulness of the IMDB rating system, but the weighted rating for Q has dropped to the super-sexy-sounding but surprisingly low number of 6.9, which makes it the lowest rated evangelion title by far on IMDB. Still, with only 150 or so votes, it's already proving to be even more divisive than EOE.

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Fri Dec 28, 2012 1:14 am I vaguely suspect that most votes come from people who didn't really watch the film yet.

[]:             Quote Post by TomasJC » Fri Dec 28, 2012 1:38 am Hyper Shinchan wrote: I vaguely suspect that most votes come from people who didn't really watch the film yet.

[]:             Quote Post by Olmer » Fri Dec 28, 2012 3:59 am Low scores are fine. This means that Anno successfully trolled people into thinking that Eva would become TTGL Mark 2 and made them upset. Great! That's one of the things I wanted Q to accomplish.

[]:             Quote Post by Redtophat » Fri Dec 28, 2012 4:33 am 150 votes eh? Most haven't even seen Q, all reading spoilers and going off of each others rage, sheep!

[]:             Quote Post by Darkwing » Fri Dec 28, 2012 10:49 pm TomasJC wrote: Either this, or people who were so confused with what went on in the film that they had a post-Q rage fest and voted a low score. Hopefully when more people see it and rewatch it the film may become more respected for what it is.

[]:             Quote Post by DeadClones » Sat Dec 29, 2012 1:06 pm Darkwing wrote: Well that depends. If they are too pissed off they may not rewatch it. Well if they watched to begin with. On the other hand, some people just are not going to like it. Eva is not for everybody.

[]:             Quote Post by moonwolf2024 » Sat Dec 29, 2012 4:47 pm That's very true. Eva can put you on a rollercoaster. Most people don't get it the first time. And they're lying their butts off if they say they do. But i'm not surprised. Complex shows like this never get good reviews....especially in the beginning.

[]:             Quote Post by Blue Monday » Sun Dec 30, 2012 4:16 am ^ Love your avatar. 90s Storm is best Storm.

[]:             Quote Post by moonwolf2024 » Sun Dec 30, 2012 1:51 pm Blue Monday wrote: ^ Love your avatar. 90s Storm is best Storm.

[]:             Quote Post by Evanut » Sun Dec 30, 2012 9:01 pm I just posted in the welcome thread, hopefully I'm not posting again too soon here... Anyway, I'm a huge fan of Anything Evangelion and a nerdy IMDB user, the rating is artificially lowered for titles without many votes, and some other things which have to do with 'regular users' voting. In order to see the arithmetic mean for any movie title, just click the users link underneath the star rating. So, the actual mean rating for Eva 3.0 is currently 8.5/10 with just 179 votes, pretty good I would say. Now, the rating will probably go down a bit over time and it's likely that most of the people who voted didn't actually see it yet, in other words, it's too early to guess what it's final rating will be Just because, here are the actual ratings for all of the Eva titles (as of 01/11/13) Neon Genesis Evangelion: 8.7 (11937 votes) Evangelion 3.0: 8.5 (179 votes) End of Evangelion: 8.3 (10373 votes) Evangelion 2.0: 8.3 (4602 votes) Evangelion 1.0: 8.0 (5482 votes) Death and Rebirth: 7.7 (3922 votes)

[]:             Quote Post by MitsumuraKun51196 » Mon Dec 31, 2012 5:38 pm Coming from me personally every thing on IMBD Is bullshit. I mean come on look at the release date COME ON!! Really? I don't even believe that. the other movies took at least 2 to 1 year to release so it might take a couple months. Plus they haven't even seen the movie yet so how can they rate it!

[]:             Quote Post by Darkwing » Mon Dec 31, 2012 9:12 pm But don't you have to be well informed and impartial to post an opinion on the internet in the first place? Damn I should have waited 4 months to post that.

[]:             Quote Post by DeadClones » Sat Jan 05, 2013 11:33 am Darkwing wrote: But don't you have to be well informed and impartial to post an opinion on the internet in the first place? Damn I should have waited 4 months to post that.

[]:             Quote Post by DanYeomans » Fri Jan 11, 2013 12:15 am It's unfortunate that movies like this get low ratings on popular movies sites, but here's my take: Not too generalize the IMDB crowd, but most of the people who go there (from my knowledge) are people who are not very well exposed to anime, or not very well exposed to evangelion. Unfortunately, when most people look at series with mecha, they assume a clear cut and simple story, and if they expect a complex story, they expect the story to tell them it's complex flat out. There doesn't seem to be a middle ground. I'm not saying Eva 3.0 is either, but I will say that it doesn't match expectations, for better or for worse. Personally, it exceeded my expectations, but for some, not so much.

[]:             Quote Post by shinji_ryoji_89 » Fri Jan 11, 2013 3:20 pm I've found that anything that has a 5.9 rating or above has a chance of being decent at least. ;) BTW, it's up to 7.0 now.

[]:             Quote Post by slothen » Sat Jan 12, 2013 2:58 am you forgot to spoiler your second spoiler.

[]:             Quote Post by Evanut » Wed Jan 16, 2013 12:47 pm Down to a 6.7 on IMDB now with 209 votes and believe it or not the mean rating is still 8.4, how does that work? Anyway, the site with the most ratings for Q so far is Myanimelist. On that site it has 634 votes with a weighted average of 8.09 -- I don't want to do the math for the actual mean which would be higher. And then there's Animenews network with a grand total of 14 votes and a mean average of 8.857

[]:             Quote Post by MitsumuraKun51196 » Sat Jan 19, 2013 3:20 pm ［情報］ IMBD Just changed the score to a 6.7 and the release date to May 5th of this year Sweet it's close to my birthday now.

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Sat Jan 19, 2013 9:30 pm IMDB is the dregs of the internet. It's actually quite impressive how sick, festered & downright ignorant the place can be. Also, ANY kind of rating score on IMDB is absolutely beyond useless. I promise, 95% of the ratings for 3.0 there are based sight unseen. Meanwhile anything comic book related that doesn't flat out suck ends up being one of the illustrious (for now) top 250 films of all time.
summary: []: [NO SPOILERS] Q gets lanced by IMDB             Quote Post by Guy Nacks » Fri Dec 28, 2012 1:09 am http://www.imdb.com/title/tt0860907/ Say what you will about the usefulness of the IMDB rating system, but the weighted rating for Q has dropped to the super-sexy-sounding but surprisingly low number of 6.9, which makes it the lowest rated evangelion title by far on IMDB. Still, with only 150 or so votes, it's already proving to be eve
